title: draba rigida
intro: Draba rigida is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the alpine cress or rigida draba. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba rigida include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Draba rigida can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
